verses.text: Tua ciangin Ammon mi Nahash a galkapte tawh paito-in Jabeshgilead umcih hi. Jabesh mite in Nahash kiangah, “Kote tawh kilemna hong bawl in; nangma na kong sem ding uh ahi,” a ci uh hi

Ahih hangin Ammon mi Nahash in amaute kiangah, “Hih thu khat tawh note tawh kilemna ka bawl ding hi. Keimah in note' taklam mittang khempeuh khelkhia-in Israel-te khempeuh tungah mindaina kong omsak ding hi,” a ci hi

Jabesh upate in ama kiangah, “Israel-te' gamsung khempeuhah kamtaite ka sawltheihna dingun ni sagih sung a hun hong sot in. Tua ciangin kote hong honkhia ding kuamah a om kei leh nang tungah kote kong kipia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Saul' khua Gibeah-ah kamtaite a tun' uh ciangin amaute in mite kiangah a thu gen uh a, tua ciangin mi khempeuh a gingin kapkhia uh hi

Tu-in Saul a bawngtalte' nung zui-in lo panin hong ciah hi. Saul in, “Amaute a kahna dingin bang in mite nasak ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jabesh mite' thute ama kiangah a gen uh hi
Saul in hih thute a zak ciangin Pasian' kha in khauhtakin amah hanthawn a, nakpi takin a sin hong so hi

Amah in bawng leengkai kap khat la a, tuate go-in semnen a, kamtaite sawlin Israel gam khempeuhah khak a, “Saul leh Samuel nung zui-in a kuankhialo peuhmah a bawngtalte' tungah hih bangin kihih ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin mite tungah Topa kihtakna hong tung a, mihing khat bangin amaute hong kuankhia uh hi
Amah in Bezek-ah amaute a kaihkhop ciangin Israel mite tul za thum pha a, Judah mite tul sawmthum pha hi

Amaute in a hong pai kamtaite kiangah, “Jabeshgilead-te tungah hih bangin gen un: ‘Zing ciang, sun hun ma-in note hong kihonkhia ding hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Kamtaite hong tungin Jabesh mite kiangah a gen uh ciangin amaute lungdam uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jabesh mite in Nahash kiangah, “Zing ciangin nang tungah kote kong kipia ding uh a, nangmah in hoih na sak bangbangin kote' tungah nong hih ding hi,” a ci uh hi

A zing ciangin Saul in mite pawl thumin a khen hi. Tua ciangin amaute' giahphual laizangah zingsang tungin hong pai uh a, sun nisat dong Ammon-te a satlum uh hi. A suakta mite kithehthang uh a, amaute mi nih nangawn a omkhopna om nawnlo hi
Tua ciangin mite in Saul kiangah, “ ‘Saul in eite hong uk ding hiam?’ a cite kua ahi hiam? Amaute i thah theihna dingin a mite hong paipih in,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Saul in, “Tuni-in mi khat zong kithatlo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tuni pen Topa in Israel-te hong hotkhiat ni ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in mite kiangah, “Hong pai un; Gilgal-ah pai-in kumpi dingin Saul kipsak phakik ni,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh Gilgal-ah pai uh a, tua lai mun Topa' mai Gilgal-ah Saul kumpi-in a koih uh hi. Amaute in tua lai Topa' mai-ah thunuama biakna pia uh a, Saul leh Israel mite khempeuh tua lai-ah nakpi takin lungdam khawm uh hi.
